creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 208704
PNG of konqueror showing mobileread.com/forums.

Invalid comparison. Notice how buttons are styled. Firefox uses Gtk while Konqueror uses Qt. Unless Qt is confugured to use Gtk themes via compatibility layer (e.g., x11-toolkits/qt5-gtkplatform) both are not going to look the same.
